Book The World of Ice & Fire (appendix)

Melantha Blackwood was a noblewoman from House Blackwood during the first half of the third century after Aegon's Conquest.

Contents

  • 1 History
  • 2 Family
  • 3 Behind the Scenes
  • 4 References

History[ ]

Melantha married the widowed Willam Stark, Lord of Winterfell and Warden of the North, after the death of his first wife, Lady Lyanne Glover.[3] Together they had two children, Edwyle and Jocelyn Stark.[2]

Behind the Scenes[ ]

Melantha may be a reference by George R. R. Martin to Melantha Jhirl, a character in Martin's novella Nightflyers.
